name: TypeWriter
description: Character-by-character text reveal with an optional blinking cursor. Ideal for hero headlines, terminal-style UIs, and code-typing effects.

text.description: The text string to type out character-by-character

speed.description: Typing speed in milliseconds per character

cursor.description: Show a blinking cursor at the typing position

loop.description: Restart typing from the beginning after completion

delay.description: Delay in milliseconds before typing starts

slots.name: text
slots.description: The text content rendered character-by-character via the text prop

layout.description: Renders as an inline span. Fits naturally inside headings, paragraphs, or other inline contexts.

aiPromptHint: Use TypeWriter for hero headlines, terminal-style text, or code-typing effects. Set speed for typing rate. Enable loop for repeating demonstrations. Pair with GradientText to type colorful text. Works as inline span so it can sit inside any heading element.

examples.title: Terminal style with custom cursor
examples.code:
<TypeWriter
  text="$ npm install @ui-universe/ui"
  speed={30}
  cursorChar="_"
  className="font-mono text-green-400"
/>

examples.title: Looping tagline
examples.code:
<TypeWriter
  text="Design. Build. Ship."
  speed={80}
  loop
  delay={500}
/>

examples.title: Slow dramatic reveal
